case_title: MARTINEZ, MARIA CRUZ VS FLORES, JUAN MANUEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, MARIA CRUZ AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-26-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-13-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3,200. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-05-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-26-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO BRING AN INTERPRETER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MARIA CRUZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN MANUEL $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,222.00, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN MANUEL
